announcements.title: [SEED] Welcome Back Students
announcements.content: Welcome to the new semester. Please check your timetable and attendance regularly.

announcements.title: [SEED] Mid Exam Schedule Notice
announcements.content: Mid exam timetable draft is now available. Teachers and students should review and report conflicts.

announcements.title: [SEED] Parent Meeting Reminder
announcements.content: Parent-teacher meeting will be held next Friday at 2:30 PM.

announcements.title: [SEED] Attendance Policy Update
announcements.content: Please note that recurring absences will trigger automated absence alerts.
